name: MAC-10 | 赭色大马士革
descriptionEn: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. A damask flower pattern has been spray-painted atop the weapon's tan-colored base. Technically the best camouflages are the ones you don't notice...
descriptionZh: 本质上就是个能射出子弹的盒子，MAC-10 微型冲锋枪拥有高频率的射速，作为交换，它还拥有略逊一筹的精准度和高后坐力。 这把武器的棕褐色底座上喷涂了大马士革式的花朵图案。 从技术上讲，最棒的伪装是发现不了的伪装……
